titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 19: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 19. (A.R. No. 1 of 1898.) UTTIRAMĒRŪR, MADHURANTAKAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the Vaikunthaperumāḷ temple.
For a detailed description on these two inscriptions.
See: V. Venkayya, Two Chōḷa inscriptions at Uttiramallūr
Published in the Annual Report of the Director-General of Archaeology in India for 1904-1905 pp. 131 ff.
K.A. Nilakanta Sastri, Studies in Chōḷa history and administration (1932), pp. 163-75.
K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer, Historical sketches of Ancient Dekhan (1967) pp. 262 ff.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matiraikoṇṭa kopparakecaripammarkkuRead varmmarkkuyāṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭu Āvatu UttirameruccaturvvedimmaṅkalattuRead catu[r]vvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom Ivvāṇṭu mutal Eṅkaḷur śrīmukappaṭi Ājai
yiṉālt tattanūrmuventaveḷāṉ Iruntu vāriyamāka Āṭṭorukkaālum sammavātasaravāriyamunRead samvatsaravāriyatoṭṭavāriyamum Erivāriyamum Iṭuvataṟku vyavastaiy cey
ta paricāvatu kuṭumpu muppatāy muppatu kuṭumpilum Avvav kuṭumpilārey kūṭi kāṉilattukku mel Iṟai nilam Uṭaiyaārai taṉ maṉaiyile A
kam Eṭuttu koṇṭu Iruppāṉai Aṟupatu pirāya(ā)ttukku Uḷmuppatu pirāyattukku melpaṭṭār vedattilum śāstrattilum kāryattilum nipuṇareṉṉappaṭṭi
ruppārai Artdhaśauśamum Atmaśauśamum Uṭaiyānay muvāṭṭiṉ Ippuṟam vāriyañ ceytilāttār vāriyañ ceytoḻinta perumakkuḷukkuRead perumakkaḷukku
Aṇiya bandukkaḷ Allātatāraik kuṭavolaikkup per tiṭṭic ceri vaḻiyey tiraṭṭi paṉṉiraṇṭu ceriyilum ceriyāl Oru perāmāṟu Etu muruvaṟiyāttāṉ Oru
bālaṉaik koṇṭu kuṭavolai vāṅkuvittup paṉṉiruvarum samvatsaravāriyamāvitākavumRead vāriyamāvatākavumAtiṉ miṉpey toṭṭavāriyattukku meṟpaṭi kuṭavo
lai vāṅkip paṉṉiruvarum toṭṭavāriyamāvatākavum niṉṟa Aṟukuṭavolaiyum Erivāriyamā
vatākavum muppatu kuṭavolai paṟiccu vāriyam(ñ) ceykiṉṟa muṉṟu tiṟattu vāriyamum munnuṟ Aṟupatu nāḷum nirampa vāriyam Oḻinta Aṉantaram Iṭum vāriyaṅkaḷ Ivyavasdhaiyolaippaṭiyey kuṭumpukkuk kuṭavolai Iṭṭukkuṭavolai paṟiccuk koṇṭey vāriyam Iṭuvatākavum vāriyañ ceytārkku bandukkaḷum cerikaḷil Aṉnnānyam
m kuṭavolaiyil per Eḻuti Iṭappaṭātārākavum pañcavāra vāriyattukkum poṉvāriyattukkum muppatu kuṭumpilum muppa(t)tu kuṭavolai Iṭṭu ceriyāl Oruttaraik kuṭavolai paṟittu paṉṉiruva(ā)rilum Aṟuva(ā)r pañcavāravāriyamaāvitākavum Aṟuvar poṉvāriyamāvatākavum samvatsaravāriyam Allā(t)ta
vāriyaṅkaḷ Orukkāl ceytārai piṉṉai Avvāriyattukku kuṭavolai Iṭappeṟāta(ti)tākavum Ipparice yivvāṇṭu mutal cantrātivat Eṉṟum kuṭavolai Eṉṟum kuṭavolai vāriyamey Iṭuvatāka deventraṉ cakravatti śrīviranārāyaṇaṉ śrīparāntaka devarākiya parakesarivarmmar śrīmukam Aruḷuc ceytu varakkāṭṭa
śrī Ājaiyiṉāl tattanūr muventaveḷānuṭaṉirukka namgrāmattu tuṣṭar keṭṭu śiṣṭar varddhi(tti)ttiṭuvārāka vyavasthai ceytom UttarameruccaturvetimaṅkalattuRead caturvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 19 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
